subject: docs(todo): add Triggers-redesign alignment task to all 10 downstream repos
body:
glow-props CLAUDE.md Triggers section was redesigned on 2026-04-17
(48 triggers in 8 groups + 6 cadence meta sweeps + 7 reflective passes,
up from 9 single-word commands). Downstream repos need their Triggers
sections replaced to match.

Added `#### Triggers — Replace with glow-props version (cross-fleet
policy 2026-04-17)` subsection to all 10 repos (canva-grid, budgy-ting,
model-pear, see-veo, repo-tor, few-lap, sun-sea-o, graphiki, four-ems,
synctone) — placed right after each repo's CLAUDE.md/Communication
subsection so cross-fleet items stay grouped at the top.

Also:
- Added `Triggers redesign` to the Cross-Cutting Gaps summary (slot #2)
  and renumbered existing items 3-15
- Updated the audit-date note at the top of the per-repo gap matrix

Tags: documentation, todo, triggers, cross-fleet
